name: Red-Eyes Zombie Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼の不死竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズ・アンデットドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card in Attack Position by Tributing 1 Zombie monster. When this card destroys a Zombie monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon that Zombie monster.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute Summon this card in Attack Position by Tributing 1 Zombie monster. When this card destroys a Zombie monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon that Zombie monster.
eff: You can Tribute Summon this card in Attack Position by Tributing 1 Zombie monster. When this card destroys a Zombie monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon that Zombie monster.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
